Hyperdrive, Class 12.name: Hyperdrive, Class 12
Hyperdrive, Class 12.description: The hyperdrive is a propulsion system that allows a starship to reach hyperspeed and traverse the void between stars in the alternate dimension of hyperspace. For a starship to have a hyperdrive, it must have a vacant hyperdrive slot modification.

Ionization Reactor.name: Ionization Reactor
Ionization Reactor.description: Ionization reactors are highly fuel-efficient reactors that trade power output for fuel economy.

Power Core Reactor.name: Power Core Reactor
Power Core Reactor.description: Power core reactors have highly variable power output capabilities, but sacrifice fuel economy and as a result.

Hub \u0026 Spoke Power Coupling.name: Hub & Spoke Power Coupling
Hub \u0026 Spoke Power Coupling.description: A hub and spoke coupling system combines attributes of both other systems, providing some flexibility and some increased power storage capacity.

Fuel Cell Reactor.name: Fuel Cell Reactor
Fuel Cell Reactor.description: Fuel cell reactors are the most common and balanced reactors on the market.

Direct Power Coupling.name: Direct Power Coupling
Direct Power Coupling.description: Direct power coupling has a central power capacitor that feeds power directly to each system.

Distributed Power Coupling.name: Distributed Power Coupling
Distributed Power Coupling.description: Distributed power coupling sacrifices flexibility by allocating power separately to each system.
